title: Pure Bones
description: purejosh's mods converted to Bare Bones Style
body:
# Pure Bones

Pure Bones is a texture pack that adds compatibility with purejosh's mods and Bare Bones. Experience a Minecraft reminiscent of the trailers with some new vanilla-style content.

Make sure you install Bare Bones alongside this pack, it would be best to install it below this one.

## Curseforge Mirror:

[Pure Bones (CurseForge Release)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/pure-bones)




## Supported Mods:

[Pure Emerald Tools](https://modrinth.com/mod/pureemeraldtools)

[Pure Quartz Tools](https://modrinth.com/mod/purequartztools)

[Pure Copper Tools](https://modrinth.com/mod/purecoppertools)

[Pure Discs - Trails and Tales](https://modrinth.com/mod/purediscstrailstales)

[Pure Discs - Tricky Trials](https://modrinth.com/mod/purediscstrickytrials)

[Pure Discs - Lofi Edition](https://modrinth.com/mod/purediscslofi)



## Planned Supported Mods:

[Pure Amethyst Tools](https://modrinth.com/mod/pureamethysttools)

[Pure Ores](https://modrinth.com/mod/pureores)



Perhaps more...
